name: Data Exfiltration Response
description: Detects and responds to data exfiltration: blocks egress traffic, identifies exfiltrated data scope, preserves network forensics, and initiates breach notification workflow.
author: Evgeniy Gantman

nodes.name: Query S3 Access Logs via Athena

body.query: SELECT requester, key, bytes_sent, remote_ip, operation FROM s3_access_logs WHERE bucket = '{{ $json.s3BucketName }}' AND parse_datetime(request_datetime,'dd/MMM/yyyy:HH:mm:ss Z') > current_timestamp - interval '24' hour ORDER BY bytes_sent DESC LIMIT 100

parameters.description:
=**URGENT: Regulatory notification may be required within 72 hours.**

**Incident:** {{ $('parse-exfil-finding').item.json.incidentId }}
**Data at Risk:** S3 Bucket `{{ $('parse-exfil-finding').item.json.s3BucketName }}`
**Transfer Volume:** {{ $('parse-exfil-finding').item.json.transferBytes }} bytes
**Destination:** {{ $('parse-exfil-finding').item.json.destinationIp }} ({{ $('parse-exfil-finding').item.json.destinationCountry }})
**GDPR Art. 33 Deadline:** {{ new Date(Date.now() + 72*3600000).toISOString() }}

**Required Actions:**
1. Determine scope of personal data accessed
2. Assess breach severity per GDPR Art. 33
3. Notify DPA if required within 72h
4. Document remediation in GDPR register
